## Traceability (required)

- Horizon (H1 committed / H2–H4 directional):

## Reproducibility notes

- [ ] Deterministic (seed recorded)
- [ ] Synthetic data only (no PHI)
- [ ] Primary metric is executable (no LLM-as-judge)
